scripts.browser:check: moon check --target js && npm run browser:build
scripts.browser:test: npm run browser:build && npm run browser:smoke
scripts.harness:check: node --check tools/harness/run.mjs && node --check tools/harness/reference-xterm.mjs && node --check tools/harness/moonbit-terminal.mjs && node --check tools/harness/prepare-reference.mjs
